<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">table</span> <span class="hljs-attr">cellpadding</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"0"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">cellspacing</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"0"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tbody</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h1</span>&gt;</span>stats_utils.py<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h1</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-1"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-1"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
Statistical analysis utilities for GRPO training results.

Each logged training step produces a mean reward = k/n where:
  n = batch_size = 128 (8 groups × 16 completions)
  k = number of correct completions out of 128

Tests implemented
-----------------
bootstrap_ci         Bootstrap 95% CI for a list of proportions.
two_prop_ztest       Two-proportion z-test: did accuracy change between two steps?
spearman_trend       Spearman rank-correlation of reward vs step (monotonic trend test).
mannwhitney          Mann-Whitney U: compare two reward sequences non-parametrically.
cohen_d              Cohen's d effect size between two reward windows.
chow_test            Chow structural-break F-test at a given candidate breakpoint.
find_phase_transition Exhaustive search for the breakpoint maximising Chow F.
run_full_analysis    Run all tests for a single experiment and return a results dict.
print_report         Pretty-print the results dict.
"""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> __future__ <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> annotations

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> math
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> random
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>from<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> typing <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>import<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> Dict, List, Optional, Tuple


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"helpers"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#helpers"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"helpers"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
helpers
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">h2</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_reconstruct_binary<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(mean_reward: float, n: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>128<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[int]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Convert a step mean reward to n binary {0,1} values."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    k = round(mean_reward * n)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] * k + [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] * (n - k)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_mean<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(xs: List[float])<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> float:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> sum(xs) / len(xs) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> xs <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_std<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(xs: List[float], ddof: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> float:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> len(xs) <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    m = _mean(xs)
    var = sum((x - m) ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> x <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> xs) / (len(xs) - ddof)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> math.sqrt(var)

    step_rewards: List[float],
    n_per_step: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>128<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    n_bootstrap: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1000<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    confidence: float = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.95<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    seed: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>42<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> Tuple[float, float, float]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Bootstrap CI for the *overall mean* across all provided step rewards.

    Parameters
    ----------
    step_rewards : list of per-step mean rewards (each is k/n_per_step)
    n_per_step   : number of binary samples per step (default 128)

    Returns
    -------
    (lower, mean, upper)
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    rng = random.Random(seed)
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-4"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-4"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Pool all binary observations<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    pool: List[int] = []
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> r <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> step_rewards:
        pool.extend(_reconstruct_binary(r, n_per_step))

    n = len(pool)
    boot_means = []
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _ <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(n_bootstrap):
        sample = [pool[rng.randint(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, n - <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)] <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> _ <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(n)]
        boot_means.append(sum(sample) / n)

    boot_means.sort()
    alpha = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - confidence
    lo = boot_means[int(alpha / <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> * n_bootstrap)]
    hi = boot_means[int((<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - alpha / <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) * n_bootstrap)]
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> lo, _mean(pool), hi


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>bootstrap_ci_per_step<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
    step_rewards: List[float],
    n_per_step: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>128<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    n_bootstrap: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1000<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    confidence: float = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.95<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    seed: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>42<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> List[Tuple[float, float, float]]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Return (lower, mean, upper) for each individual step."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> [
        bootstrap_ci([r], n_per_step, n_bootstrap, confidence, seed + i)
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i, r <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(step_rewards)
    ]


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Two-proportion z-test<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ol</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>two_prop_ztest<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
    p1: float,
    p2: float,
    n1: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>128<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
    n2: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>128<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> Tuple[float, float]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Two-proportion z-test: H0: p1 == p2 (two-sided).

    Returns (z_statistic, p_value).
    Directional (one-sided, H1: p2 <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> p1): halve p_value.
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p_pool = (p1 * n1 + p2 * n2) / (n1 + n2)
    se = math.sqrt(p_pool * (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - p_pool) * (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> / n1 + <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> / n2))
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> se == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> float(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"inf"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    z = (p2 - p1) / se
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-6"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-6"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Approximate p-value from standard normal (two-sided)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    p_value = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> * (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - _standard_normal_cdf(abs(z)))
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> z, p_value


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_standard_normal_cdf<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(z: float)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> float:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Approximation of Phi(z) accurate to ~1e-7."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> * (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> + math.erf(z / math.sqrt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)))


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-7"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-7"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ol</span> <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"3"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Spearman rank-correlation (trend test)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ol</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>spearman_trend<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
    steps: List[int],
    rewards: List[float],
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> Tuple[float, float]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Spearman rank-correlation of rewards vs steps.
    H0: rho = 0 (no monotonic trend).

    Returns (rho, p_value).
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    n = len(rewards)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>assert<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> n == len(steps), <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"steps and rewards must have the same length"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>_ranks<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(xs)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        sorted_idx = sorted(range(len(xs)), key=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>lambda<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i: xs[i])
        ranks = [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] * len(xs)
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> rank, idx <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(sorted_idx, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>):
            ranks[idx] = float(rank)
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> ranks

    r_steps = _ranks(steps)
    r_rewards = _ranks(rewards)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Pearson on ranks<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    mean_s = _mean(r_steps)
    mean_r = _mean(r_rewards)
    num = sum((r_steps[i] - mean_s) * (r_rewards[i] - mean_r) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(n))
    den = math.sqrt(
        sum((r_steps[i] - mean_s) ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(n))
        * sum((r_rewards[i] - mean_r) ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(n))
    )
    rho = num / den <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> den != <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>t-statistic for H0: rho=0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> abs(rho) <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>= <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> rho, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    t = rho * math.sqrt((n - <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) / (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - rho ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    p_value = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> * (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - _standard_normal_cdf(abs(t)))
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> rho, p_value

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Mann-Whitney U<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>mannwhitney<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
    group_a: List[float],
    group_b: List[float],
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> Tuple[float, float, str]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Mann-Whitney U test: H0: distributions of A and B are equal.

    Returns (U_statistic, p_value_approx, conclusion).
    Uses normal approximation (valid for n <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>= 10).
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    na, nb = len(group_a), len(group_b)
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Count U_A = number of (a, b) pairs where a <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> b<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    u_a = sum(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> a <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> group_a <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> b <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> group_b <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> a <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> b) + \
          sum(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> a <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> group_a <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> b <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> group_b <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> a == b)
    u_b = na * nb - u_a
    u = min(u_a, u_b)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-13"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-13"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Normal approximation<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    mu_u = na * nb / <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    sigma_u = math.sqrt(na * nb * (na + nb + <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) / <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>12<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    z = (u - mu_u) / sigma_u <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> sigma_u <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p_value = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> * (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> - _standard_normal_cdf(abs(z)))

    conclusion = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"SIGNIFICANT (p <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span> 0.05)"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> p_value <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.05<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"not significant"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> u, p_value, conclusion


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-14"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-14"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Cohen's d<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>cohen_d<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(group1: List[float], group2: List[float])<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> float:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Cohen's d = (mean2 - mean1) / pooled_std.
    Convention: group2 is the later/higher group.
    Magnitude: <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span>0.2 negligible, 0.2-0.5 small, 0.5-0.8 medium, <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>0.8 large.
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    n1, n2 = len(group1), len(group2)
    m1, m2 = _mean(group1), _mean(group2)
    s1, s2 = _std(group1), _std(group2)
    pooled = math.sqrt(((n1 - <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) * s1 ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> + (n2 - <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) * s2 ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>) / (n1 + n2 - <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> (m2 - m1) / pooled <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> pooled <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> float(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"inf"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Chow structural-break test<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ol</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
