<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ol</span> <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"9"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Multi-seed analysis (independent replication)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ol</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>multi_seed_summary<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
    seed_reward_curves: List[List[float]],
    n_per_step: int = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>128<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> Dict:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    Aggregate statistics across multiple independent seed runs.

    Parameters
    ----------
    seed_reward_curves : list of reward curves (one per seed run)
    n_per_step         : binary samples per step

    Returns dict with:
        n_seeds, per_step_mean, per_step_std, per_step_ci,
        final_mean, final_std, final_ci,
        convergence_steps (step to reach 80% for each seed)
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    n_seeds = len(seed_reward_curves)
    min_len = min(len(c) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> c <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> seed_reward_curves)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-38"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-38"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Per-step mean and std across seeds<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    per_step_mean = []
    per_step_std = []
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> t <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(min_len):
        vals = [c[t] <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> c <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> seed_reward_curves]
        per_step_mean.append(_mean(vals))
        per_step_std.append(_std(vals))

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-39"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-39"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Final performance across seeds<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    final_vals = [c[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>-1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> c <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> seed_reward_curves]
    final_mean = _mean(final_vals)
    final_std = _std(final_vals)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-40"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-40"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Bootstrap CI on final performance (across seeds)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    lo, mu, hi = bootstrap_ci(final_vals, n_per_step=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, n_bootstrap=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1000<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-41"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-41"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Convergence step for each seed<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    convergence_steps = []
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> curve <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> seed_reward_curves:
        step_80 = next((i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i, x <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(curve) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> x <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>= <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.80<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), len(curve))
        convergence_steps.append(step_80)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> {
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"n_seeds"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: n_seeds,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"per_step_mean"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: per_step_mean,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"per_step_std"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: per_step_std,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"final_mean"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: final_mean,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"final_std"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: final_std,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"final_ci"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: (lo, mu, hi),
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"convergence_steps"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: convergence_steps,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"convergence_mean"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: _mean([float(s) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> s <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> convergence_steps]),
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"convergence_std"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>: _std([float(s) <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> s <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> convergence_steps]),
    }


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>print_multi_seed_report<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(label: str, summary: Dict)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Pretty-print multi-seed analysis."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"\n<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'='<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>*<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>60<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"  Multi-Seed Report: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{label}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'='<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>*<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>60<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"  Seeds: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'n_seeds'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"  Final performance: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'final_mean'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>f}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> +/- <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'final_std'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>f}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    lo, mu, hi = summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"final_ci"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"  Final 95% CI: [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{lo:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>f}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{hi:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>f}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"  Convergence step (to 80%): <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'convergence_mean'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>.1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>f}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> +/- <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'convergence_std'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>.1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>f}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"    Per seed: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{summary[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'convergence_steps'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print()


<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-42"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-42"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ol</span> <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"10"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>One-way ANOVA (for ablation with <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span>2 levels)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ol</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">hr</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>oneway_anova<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(
    groups: List[List[float]],
    group_labels: Optional[List[str]] = None,
)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> -<span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> Dict:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""
    One-way ANOVA for comparing k groups.

    Parameters
    ----------
    groups       : list of groups (each is a list of observations)
    group_labels : optional labels

    Returns dict with F, p, group means, and eta-squared.
    """<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    k = len(groups)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> group_labels <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>is<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>None<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:
        group_labels = [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"G<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{i+<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> range(k)]

    all_obs = []
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> g <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> groups:
        all_obs.extend(g)
    grand_mean = _mean(all_obs)
    N = len(all_obs)

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    ss_between = sum(n * (m - grand_mean) ** <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> n, m <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> zip(group_sizes, group_means))
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>

    df_within = N - k

    ms_between = ss_between / df_between <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> df_between <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
